Defendant'S Motion To Compel Psychological Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Oct-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Nicholas A. Boylan, tel. No. 1-619-696-6344 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Andrew J. Kozlow of Ericksen Arbuthnot Law Office, Tel. No. 1-510-832-7770
appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D; The court modified its tentative ruling: Defendant Chinatown Community Development Center's motion to compel psychiatric and physical examination of plaintiff Andrew Bailey is granted in large part. Absent a stipulation to the contrary, the examination may not exceed three hours excluding breaks and must be completed in a single day. Mr. Bailey may take as many breaks as he feels he needs to take. While Mr. Bailey may not have his counsel or a support person in the room with him when he is being examined, he may have a support person of his choosing in a nearby location such as the examiner's waiting room and he may visit with that support person during the breaks of the examination. There will be no other restrictions or limitations on the examination. Mr. Bailey has not shown good cause for any other restrictions or limitations on the examination. Order signed in open court.
